query: SELECT a.id, a.name, ap.id as pdi_id, ap.trilhaId, t.name as trilhaNome FROM alunos a JOIN assessment_pdi ap ON ap.alunoId = a.id LEFT JOIN trilhas t ON t.id = ap.trilhaId WHERE a.name LIKE '%Bruno Martins%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT a.id, a.name, ap.id as pdi_id, ap.trilhaId, t.name as trilhaNome FROM alunos a JOIN assessment_pdi ap ON ap.alunoId = a.id LEFT JOIN trilhas t ON t.id = ap.trilhaId WHERE a.name LIKE '%Bruno Martins%';
